name: alterlab-lamindb
description: Manage, annotate, and trace biological data with LaminDB, an open-source FAIR data framework that makes datasets queryable, versioned, and reproducible. Use when registering or querying biological datasets (scRNA-seq, spatial, flow cytometry), validating and curating data against ontologies (genes, cell types, diseases, tissues), tracking data lineage and computational workflows, building data lakehouses, or wiring integrations with Nextflow, Snakemake, W&B, or MLflow. Part of the AlterLab Acade
author: AlterLab-IEU
